findings.evidence: `rg -n "rfl" code/TauCeti/Algebra/AlgebraicGroup/AdditiveGroupBaseChange.lean` reports line 119; `AlgHom.mapValue_apply` is already public at `TauCeti/Algebra/AlgebraicGroup/FunctorOfPoints.lean:152`.
findings.fix: Replace the final `rfl` with an explicit rewrite/simp step using `AlgHom.mapValue_apply` and `ofConv_toConv`, or add/use a pointwise `mapValue` evaluation lemma so the proof does not depend on those implementations.
findings.issue: `toAdd_baseChangePointsMulEquiv_mapValue` closes the final pointwise equality by `rfl`, hiding reliance on the current definitional shape of `AlgHom.mapValue`, `WithConv.ofConv`, and restricted scalar coercions.

summary: One proof relies on undocumented definitional equality through value-map and coercion wrappers; make the pointwise computation explicit with existing lemmas.
